data.body:
[Triple Drop Campaign Preview]

The amount of rewards dropped in Missions will be tripled.
Don't miss out on this chance!

🗓️Mission Normal x3: 2/12 (Mon) 7:00 PM – 2/16 (Fri) 6:59 PM (UTC)
🗓️Mission Hard x3: 2/16 (Fri) 7:00 PM – 2/19 (Mon) 6:59 PM (UTC)
